title: pelargonium × obtusidentatum
intro: Pelargonium × obtusifolium, also known as Pelargonium × obtusidentatum, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its roots and leaves, which contain compounds like asperuloside and geraniin, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × obtusifolium include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive problems.
